view.title: Settings
view.description.providers: Configure AI providers and select models for different tasks
view.description.mcpServers: Connect external tool servers to extend AI capabilities
general.title: General
general.subtitle: Change how the app looks
general.theme.title: Theme
general.language.title: Language
aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.subtitle: Control how research agents run in parallel
aiAgents.concurrency.title: Parallel Agents
aiAgents.concurrency.description: Set the maximum number of agent tasks that can run simultaneously
aiAgents.concurrency.label: Max parallel agents
aiAgents.concurrency.tooltip: Controls how many search and extraction tasks run at the same time. Higher concurrency increases the risk of hitting your provider's rate limit. Once the limit is reached, tasks may fail or retry automatically, which can make the overall job much slower than a lower concurrency setting. The optimal value depends on your provider's rate limit policy.
aiAgents.concurrency.hint: Depends on your provider's rate limit policy
aiAgents.retries.title: Agent Retries
aiAgents.retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for agent operations
aiAgents.retries.label: Max retries
aiAgents.retries.tooltip: Controls how many times an agent will retry when operations fail (connection errors, tool call failures, etc.)
aiAgents.retries.hint: Higher values increase resilience but may slow down failure responses
aiAgents.searchEngine.title: Search Engine
aiAgents.searchEngine.description: Choose which search engine agents use for web research
aiAgents.searchEngine.label: Default search engine
aiAgents.searchEngine.custom.name: Engine name
aiAgents.searchEngine.custom.url.hint: Use %s where the search query should be inserted
aiAgents.timeouts.title: Timeouts
aiAgents.timeouts.description: Configure timeout limits for different agent operations
aiAgents.timeouts.response.label: Response timeout
aiAgents.timeouts.response.tooltip: Maximum time the AI can spend generating a response or planning a task. Increase this if you use models that take longer to think.
aiAgents.timeouts.action.label: Browser action timeout
aiAgents.timeouts.action.tooltip: Time limit for each browser automation step. Complex web pages may need higher values.
aiAgents.timeouts.interactive.label: Interactive timeout
aiAgents.timeouts.interactive.tooltip: Maximum wait time for human interactions. This includes time spent waiting for your approval or input.
aiAgents.timeouts.streaming.label: Streaming timeout
aiAgents.timeouts.streaming.tooltip: Maximum time to wait between data chunks from the AI. If the AI pauses longer than this, the connection will time out.
connection.title: Connection
connection.subtitle: Choose how this app's backend is reached
connection.mode.title: Mode
connection.mode.description: Run locally on this device, or expose the backend for remote browser access.
connection.mode.standalone.label: Local Mode
connection.mode.standalone.description: Backend runs on this device only (localhost, random port).
connection.mode.standalone.tooltip: Best for everyday desktop use. The backend binds to 127.0.0.1 on an automatically chosen random port, so it never conflicts with other apps and only this app can reach it.
connection.mode.remote.label: Remote Access
connection.mode.remote.description: Expose the backend on your network so any browser can connect.
connection.mode.remote.tooltip: Listens on the host and port you set (default 0.0.0.0 = all network interfaces). Open http://<your-ip>:<port> in any browser on the same network to use the app remotely. The web UI is served by the backend, so no extra setup is needed.
connection.host.title: Host
connection.host.description: Network interface the backend binds to (Remote Access only)
connection.host.label: Host address
connection.host.tooltip: Network interface the backend binds to. 0.0.0.0 listens on all interfaces (recommended for remote access); a specific IP listens only on that interface. Only editable in Remote Access mode.
connection.port.title: Port
connection.port.description: Port used to reach the backend (Remote Access only)
connection.port.label: Port
connection.port.tooltip: Port browsers use to reach the backend in Remote Access mode. Choose a fixed, open, unused port. In Local Mode the port is assigned automatically.
connection.restartHint: Connection changes take effect after restarting the app.
